title: Robin Nears Enies Lobby
description: The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp, Franky. The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm so glad!! Are you okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Did they do anything to you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And then we'll run away together!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Is that nice Nico Robin? Hm...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin... What are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky!! Cut the third car loose!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey! What're you trying to do!?

summary: The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.
